case: VAST MC2 - John Windward Anomalous SaidIT Post Investigation

summary.finding: Coordinated campaign involving anomalous SaidIT posts

key_findings.description: John Windward published 3 SaidIT posts using .txt files as content source (out of 108 total SaidIT posts)
Consistent behavior: Receive file → Immediately publish SaidIT post → Immediately delete source file
evidence: SwiftWren.txt: Posted at 19:21:15, Deleted at 19:21:17 (2 seconds later)
MellowOtter.txt: Posted at 08:56:04, Deleted at 08:56:06 (2 seconds later)
HiddenOrca.txt: Posted at 20:45:42, Deleted at 20:45:44 (2 seconds later)

key_findings.description: 10 individuals participated in all three file propagation chains
evidence: Common participants: lily_anchorline, john_windward, gabriel_sonar, olivia_keel, mia_fender, evelyn_dock, zoey_drydock, levi_signal, owen_hatch, victoria_rigging

key_findings.description: Identified high-frequency spreaders in the network
Different creators for each file, suggesting coordinated campaign
evidence: HiddenOrca.txt: Pre-existing (no creation event in data)

2046-05-10: 20:45:40 - Chloe Ballast transfers HiddenOrca.txt to John Windward
20:45:42 - John Windward publishes SaidIT post using HiddenOrca.txt
2046-05-11: 08:56:02 - Lily Anchorline transfers MellowOtter.txt to John Windward
08:56:04 - John Windward publishes SaidIT post using MellowOtter.txt
2046-05-17: 19:21:13 - Chloe Ballast transfers SwiftWren.txt to John Windward
19:21:15 - John Windward publishes SaidIT post using SwiftWren.txt

conclusions: John Windward is participating in a coordinated campaign to publish anomalous content on SaidIT
The campaign involves a network of at least 10 individuals
Three separate .txt files were used as content sources, each following the same operational pattern
The network exhibits hierarchical structure with key spreaders (Evelyn Dock, Gabriel Sonar, Levi Signal)
Files are systematically deleted after posting to avoid detection
recommendations: Investigate the role of key spreaders (Evelyn Dock, Gabriel Sonar, Levi Signal)
Examine the content of the .txt files to understand the nature of the anomalous posts
Review John Windward's connections to the transfer agents (Chloe Ballast, Lily Anchorline, Olivia Keel)
Investigate the file creators (Emma Harbor, Noah Mariner) for potential involvement
Monitor SaidIT for similar patterns in the future
